title: Barebones Voicechat
description: Make Simple Voice Chat more like Barebones (Unofficial)
body:
Barebones Voicechat

Make Simple Voice Chat compatible with Barebones



This resource pack all the simple voice chat icons, giving it a more simplistic, barebones-like, dark and greenish style.

This pack needs the Simple Voice Chat mod to be installed on the client.
